title: StoredSetupConfig
description: Setup values persisted in the encrypted local setup file.

discord_public_key_ref.description: Discord public key secret reference or secret value.

discord_token_ref.description: Discord token secret reference or secret value.

github_token_ref.description: GitHub credential secret reference or secret value.

openai_api_key_ref.description: OpenAI API key secret reference or secret value.

openai_oauth_session_ref.description: ChatGPT OAuth session reference or serialized session state.

sonarcloud_token_ref.description: SonarCloud token secret reference or secret value.
